scenarios.title: Accidental screen crack repair within plan term
scenarios.description: Customer's iPhone 12 screen cracked due to an accidental drop during normal daily use, reported within 24 months of retail purchase.

service_fee.notes: Service fee applies as stated for each ADH claim in section 3.2.

policy_references.snippet: ADH coverage includes failures caused by an unexpected and unintentional external event such as drops during normal daily use, subject to a $49 service fee per claim.
Apple provides up to two ADH service events within the Plan Term.

scenarios.reasoning: The cracked screen resulted from an accidental drop which qualifies as accidental damage from handling under section 3.2. The claim was submitted within the 24-month Plan Term. The $49 service fee applies per ADH claim. This is the first ADH event submitted, thus counts toward the two-incident limit.
